Drew (Hastings).note: Pitched in 2026 opener vs Blind Brook. Part of 2025 Section 1 Class B finalist team.

Ryan Lockwood (Ardsley).note: Featured in scrimmage post vs DF (Mar 19).

Ryan Gentry (Tuckahoe).note: Announced Mar 22 via @tuckahoevarsitybaseball. Part of 3x Section 1 Class C championship team.

Connor Brice (Tuckahoe).note: Signed D1 with Villanova for baseball. Two-sport athlete. Struck out 14 in 2025 Section 1 Class C championship Game 1 vs Haldane.

Patrick Shields (Haldane).note: Tagged in 2025 sectional playoff post vs Tuckahoe.

Lughan McIlwaine (Haldane).note: 4.1 IP, 0 R, 2 H, 6 K in 2026 opener vs Peekskill (W 10-0). Also pitched in relief. Freshman starter — rare for Class B.

Theo Swan (Haldane).note: 5 RBIs including bases-clearing double vs Peekskill in 2026 opener. Ninth grader making immediate varsity impact.

Oliver Herman (Haldane).note: Relief appearance in 2026 opener vs Peekskill. Part of young pitching staff.

Lincoln McCarthy (Haldane).note: Only senior on Haldane's 2026 roster. Key leadership presence on very young team.

Jack Pastor (Blind Brook).note: Double with 2 RBIs in 14-2 W vs Saunders (2024-25). Went 2-2 with 2 SB vs Pleasantville. Returning impact bat.

Nico Palacios (Blind Brook).note: Senior on 2026 Blind Brook roster per MaxPreps.

Elliott Zwicker (Blind Brook).note: Senior on 2026 Blind Brook roster per MaxPreps.

Colin Kelley (Rye Neck).note: Senior captain, pitcher/CF. Named to Section 1 All-Section team. Multi-sport varsity athlete. Key arm on 3-1 Rye Neck squad.

Eddie Major (Edgemont).note: On 2026 Edgemont varsity roster per MaxPreps. Lost 1-5 to DF on Apr 7.

Ari Malz (Edgemont).note: On 2026 Edgemont varsity roster per MaxPreps.

Seth Waxler (Edgemont).note: On 2026 Edgemont varsity roster per MaxPreps.

Charlie Farbman (Sleepy Hollow).note: On Sleepy Hollow roster per MaxPreps. Team beat DF 18-1 on Apr 8.

Fernando Lemus (Sleepy Hollow).note: On Sleepy Hollow roster per MaxPreps.

Ardsley.intel: Ardsley is 0-3 on the season, L3 streak. Lost 1-7 to Pleasantville (Mar 24), 1-5 (Mar 28), and 2-8 (Apr 6). Offense has scored just 4 runs in 3 games. Up next: vs Dobbs Ferry Apr 14 4:30 PM.

Blind Brook.intel: Blind Brook is 1-2, W1 after beating Edgemont 8-7 (Mar 26). Lost to Pawling 5-15 and Hastings 2-6. At Haldane today Apr 10. Up next: vs Irvington Apr 11, at Briarcliff Apr 18, at DF Apr 20 (League).

Edgemont.intel: Edgemont is 0-4, L4 streak. Lost to Blind Brook 7-8, unknown opponent 1-11, Dobbs Ferry 1-5, and 0-10 on Apr 9. Struggling offensively. Up next: Apr 10, Apr 11.

Haldane.intel: Haldane is 1-3, L3. Won opener 10-0 (Mar 30), then lost three straight: 1-13 (Apr 1), 10-12 to Sleepy Hollow (Apr 6), 0-13 to Irvington (Apr 8). Hosting Blind Brook today Apr 10. Up next: at DF Apr 18 11:00 AM.

Hastings.intel: Hastings is 1-3, L3. Beat Blind Brook 6-2 in opener (Coach Stampfl's 100th career win). Then lost to Pelham 0-2, Westlake 2-11, Eastchester 0-1. Hosting Putnam Valley today Apr 10 at Burke Estate. Up next: vs Scarsdale Apr 11, at Ardsley Apr 13, at DF Apr 24 (League).

Irvington.intel: Irvington is 2-1, W2 streak. Lost to DF 2-6, then beat Sleepy Hollow 9-8 and Haldane 13-0. Offense has come alive with 22 runs in last 2 games. Up next: Apr 10, Apr 11, vs DF Apr 13 (Non-league).

Leffell School.intel: Leffell is 0-0 with no results on DigitalSports. Schedule begins Mar 26 but no scores posted. Up next: Apr 13, Apr 15.

Pearl River.intel: Pearl River is 1-1, W1. Lost opener 7-8 (Mar 23), then won 10-0 (Apr 9). Hosting DF tomorrow Apr 11 at 3:00 PM. Up next: vs Dobbs Ferry Apr 11 3:00 PM.

Rye Neck.intel: Rye Neck is 3-1, L1. Won first 3 games: 8-2 (Mar 25), 13-1 (Apr 1), 15-5 (Apr 2), then lost 0-6 on Apr 8. Potent offense averaging 9 runs/game through 4 games. School IG has no baseball content. Up next: Apr 10.

Saunders.intel: Saunders DigitalSports shows 0-0 with no events added. Lost to DF 3-7 (Mar 27) and Irvington JV 1-18 (Mar 26). Up next: unknown.

Sleepy Hollow.intel: Sleepy Hollow is 3-3, W2 streak. Beat DF 18-1 on Apr 8. Also beat Haldane 12-10 (Apr 6). Earlier results: W 5-4, L 8-9, L 0-14, L 5-15. Offense can explode. Up next: Apr 10.

Tuckahoe.intel: Tuckahoe is 1-1, L1. Beat Somers 6-5 (Apr 7, Connor Brice on mound), lost to Mount Vernon 6-7 (Apr 9, Declan McColgan pitched). Playing at New Rochelle today Apr 10. SS Rocco Briante, DH Connor Brice, RF Jay Romeo anchor lineup. Up next: at New Rochelle Apr 10 4:30 PM.

Valhalla.intel: Valhalla DigitalSports has no events added (0-0 shown). Lost to Westlake 5-17 (Mar 30 in Florida per IG). Up next: at Blind Brook Apr 8 (may have already played), at Hastings Apr 18.

Westlake.intel: Westlake is 4-1 per IG (DS shows 3-0, undercount). Lost opener at Panas, then won 4 straight: Bronxville 4-3, Valhalla 17-5, Hastings 11-2, JJCR 14-12. Potent offense with Luke Nargi, Nino Merritt, Matt Milo all producing. Played at Tappan Zee Apr 9. Up next: vs DF May 11 (Non-league).
